Cash Access Survey — Live Results
⚙ SETUP — 3 quick steps to enable shared responses:
1. Sign up free at jsonbin.io
2. Go to API Keys in your dashboard → copy your Master Key
3. Open this HTML file, find JSONBIN_CONFIG and paste your key into masterKey

A storage bin is created automatically on the very first submission.
Until then, responses are saved locally in this browser only.
